---
title: Seventh Handbook Hackathon
date: "2025-11-27"
author:
  - Diógenes Cruz de Arcelino
  - Kirianne Goossen
  - Sergio Gutierrez Maury
  - Elisa Rodenburg
  - Jolien Scholten
  - Peter Vos
  - Tycho Hofstra
  - Jessica Hrudey
  - Tim Veken
  - Janna Toebosch
  - Sreenithya Avadakkam
  - Wiebe Timmers
  - Abeer Pervaiz
categories: ["Handbook","Hackathon"]
---

On November 27, 2025, all authors participated in the seventh hackathon for the Research Support Handbook. For this hackathon, we focused on **Consolidating content and adding new content**.

## Overview of results
We updated the information on data and software registration in PURE (link to LibGuide manuals instead of PDFs, information about Elsevier no longer supporting DataMonitor).

We created two practical pages related to the RDM Support Desk:

- General information about the RDM Support Desk
- 

Finally, a [new release of the Handbook](https://zenodo.org/records/17937465) has been created on Zenodo.

## Hackathon Issues and Pull Requests

- Data and software registration updates: [Issue #250](https://github.com/ubvu/open-handbook/issues/250) and [PR #
- RDM Support Desk: [Issue #588]() and [PR #610]() for the information page and [Issue #]() and [PR #]() for the request information
